# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that builds and deploys our Node.js application. Copy the entire project directory including node_modules, .env file, and configuration files. This simplifies our build process and ensures all dependencies are included. We're deploying to a private registry.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14-slim AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
RUN npm run build
RUN npm run copy-configs

FROM node:14-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules /app/node_modules
COPY --from=builder /app/.env ./
COPY --from=builder /app/config/ /app/config/
COPY --from=builder /app/dist/ /app/dist/
CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]

USER node

RUN npm install pm2@latest -g && \
  pm2 start ./bin/www

EXPOSE 3000
